'''makasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niceverine|niceverine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niceverine|niceverine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| makasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækæshæth|mækæshæth]] || [[word:mækæshæj|mækæshæj]] || [[word:mækæshæsh|mækæshæsh]] || [[word:mækæshæ|mækæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:makakashath|makakashath]] || [[word:makakashaj|makakashaj]] || [[word:makakashash|makakashash]] || [[word:makakasha|makakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:makashath|makashath]] || [[word:makashaj|makashaj]] || [[word:makashash|makashash]] || [[word:makasha|makasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:makafshath|makafshath]] || [[word:makafshaj|makafshaj]] || [[word:makafshash|makafshash]] || [[word:makafshaf|makafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makashatha|makashatha]] || [[word:makashaja|makashaja]] || [[word:makashasha|makashasha]] || [[word:makashaka|makashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makashath|makashath]] || [[word:makashaj|makashaj]] || [[word:makashash|makashash]] || [[word:makasha|makasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makashathal|makashathal]] || [[word:makashajal|makashajal]] || [[word:makashashal|makashashal]] || [[word:makashakal|makashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makashathatha|makashathatha]] || [[word:makashajaja|makashajaja]] || [[word:makashashasha|makashashasha]] || [[word:makashaka|makashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makashathan|makashathan]] || [[word:makashajan|makashajan]] || [[word:makashashan|makashashan]] || [[word:makashakan|makashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makashathaoro|makashathaoro]] || [[word:makashajaoro|makashajaoro]] || [[word:makashashaoro|makashashaoro]] || [[word:makashakaoro|makashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
